_comment: Install profiles for the npm installer (Channel B). They select WHICH skills
get copied to .be/skills — agents, commands, semgrep, docs and the
rest are always copied in full. Use: npx ... install --profile=<name>.
Default is `full` (everything) so the installer stays backward-compatible.
A skill is included when its directory name starts with any listed prefix.

minimal.description: Process skills + engineering principles only — the universal core.

backend.description: Backend service work: process, backend, security, QA, infra, ops.

frontend.description: Frontend work: process, frontend, QA, security.
